code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut sum = 0
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    let is_end = i == n
    mut is_ws = false
    if is_end
      is_ws = true
    else
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_ws = true
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    end
    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          if v > 0
            sum = sum + v * 2
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("result=#{sum}")
end
